place: Noble Emmerse, Sukhumvit Road, Khlong Tan, Khlong Toei, Bangkok 10110
title: Noble Emmerse Phrom Phong
blurb: An artful 55-storey landmark rising over Phrom Phong — Noble Emmerse pairs a calm, gallery-like interior language with the full energy of the EM District, moments from the Emporium, EmQuartier and BTS Phrom Phong. One-bedroom homes through penthouses, off-plan.
detail:
Noble Emmerse Phrom Phong offers a rare balance of artistic living and urban convenience. A 55-storey high-rise of 358 residences, the tower is composed for a life of calm refinement amidst the vibrant energy of Sukhumvit — interiors of travertine, warm timber and sculptural light that feel more gallery than lobby.

Its position is the quiet luxury here. The residence sits within easy reach of the EM District — Emporium and EmQuartier — and the green of Benchasiri Park, moments from BTS Phrom Phong, and surrounded by international schools, world-class hospitals and five-star hotels.

Life unfolds across distinct amenity levels. The ground floor holds the Exotique Lobby, a Greenery Retreat and a Grab & Go station; the fourth floor gathers the Aqua Serene Pool, Emmerse Cocoon Spa, gym, Pilates studio and a cinema lounge; and high on the fifty-first floor, the Mystique Social Club, Sky Lounge, private dining and the Urban Sky Lawn open to the city skyline.

Residences range from efficient one-bedrooms of around 30 m² to expansive penthouses of up to 521 m². An automated parking building of nineteen levels provides approximately 90% parking capacity. Off-plan, with completion expected in Q3 2030 — priced from ฿8,260,000.
